title: Tinc Glitterarty Liquid Gel Pens for Kids | Set of 8 Different Glittery Colours with a Fruity Fragrance | Includes Snap Shut Carry Case | Great for School, Home & Trips - Pack of 8, GLITGLPN
features: SET OF 8 GEL PENS - Our Glitterarty Liquid Gel Pens come in a handy set of 8 – choose from a variety of colours to highlight your homework, plus they’re great to use for glittery additions to creative work too!

FRUITY FRAGRANCE - Each of the 8 glitter gel pens feature a different fruity fragrance - Perfect if you're working on homework or using them for drawing and can enjoy a different scent depending on which pen you pick up!

STURDY PLASTIC CASE - Our Glitterarty Gel Pens are presented in a rigid and sturdy plastic case designed for durability. Perfect for keeping all your pens in one place, and hard enough to survive the backpack on the way to school
FUN & FASHIONABLE - Stand out from the crowd with your own fun Tinc products, all stylishly designed to inspire children and adults through creativity.

MADE BY TINC - At Tinc we pride ourselves on making premium and practical products that both kids and parents can both enjoy whether at school or at home - Made by Tinc, the home of colourful and creative stationery
